title: SSA Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Procurement Specialist Posts
description: The Samagra Shiksha Assam (SSA) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Procurement Specialist Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, MBA, and PGDM students can apply for the SSA Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
